meta.note: 슬롯 1·2·3 부드러운 그라데이션 경계 테스트용. 본 prompts.json 영향 없음.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 샘플 — REACT-04 깜짝 놀람 (1년 방치 ETF 계좌 충격). 상단·하단 경계를 부드러운 그라데이션으로.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, huge round eyes popping wide open in extreme shock, small pink nose, jaw dropped in disbelief, both paws pressed against the cheeks, small impact lines radiating outward. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, upper body shot. On the RIGHT side: a large dusty rusted ETF account card covered in spider webs and cobwebs, behind it a steeply downward-plunging red candlestick chart, a vintage analog clock in the upper-right corner indicating one year has passed, and a glowing red exclamation icon hovering above the chart. Faint dust motes drifting through the air. Background: deep navy blue gradient with subtle red warning glow particles and a faint financial grid pattern. COMPOSITION RULE: The image features a smooth, atmospheric gradient transition from the visual scene at the top into a deep solid black panel at the bottom, designed for clean text overlay placement. The upper portion of the frame holds the main subject and all visual elements at full saturation. The bottom 25% of the frame is fully solid pure black (#000000) reserved for text. The band between the 45% and 75% of the frame height carries a long, seamless gradient fade from the scene into black — no hard horizontal cut-off line, no abrupt visual edge between scene and black. The transition should feel organic and cinematic, like atmospheric darkness softly fading in, not a clean knife-cut. Absolutely no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no watermark anywhere in the image. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with strong red shock atmosphere.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 샘플 — REACT-05 설명 중(교수 모드). 좌측 균열·먼지 덮인 불균형 원형차트(Before), 우측 빛나는 황금-에메랄드 균형 원형차트(After). 둘 사이를 황금 화살표가 가로지름. 똑똑이가 안경 쓰고 한 손가락 들어 강조. 상단·하단 경계는 부드러운 그라데이션.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes, small pink nose, calm professional expression wearing small round glasses, one finger raised in a 'listen up' teaching gesture. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk stands in the CENTER of the upper frame, half body shot. On the LEFT side: a cracked and faded pie chart with uneven segments in muted gray and dull red tones, with visible fractures and small dust particles floating around it, representing a neglected unbalanced portfolio. On the RIGHT side: a perfectly balanced pie chart glowing with radiant gold and emerald green light, with luminous edges and a subtle halo effect, representing a freshly rebalanced portfolio. A bold golden arrow runs from the left chart to the right chart, indicating transformation. Background: deep navy blue gradient with subtle financial grid pattern and soft sparkle particles around the right chart. COMPOSITION RULE: The image features a smooth, atmospheric gradient transition from the visual scene at the top into a deep solid black panel at the bottom, designed for clean text overlay placement. The upper portion of the frame holds the main subject and all visual elements at full saturation. The bottom 25% of the frame is fully solid pure black (#000000) reserved for text. The band between the 45% and 75% of the frame height carries a long, seamless gradient fade from the scene into black, organic and cinematic, like atmospheric darkness softly fading in. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with clear before-after contrast.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 샘플 — INTRO-05 정면 응시 + 손짓 (저울 균형). 상단·하단 경계를 칼같은 솔리드 블랙이 아닌 부드러운 그라데이션으로 자연스럽게 페이드.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes looking directly at the viewer with a warm confident smile, small pink nose. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, full body shot, one paw extended forward in a welcoming presenter gesture inviting the viewer. On the RIGHT side: an oversized ornate golden balance scale, perfectly balanced with both pans level — the LEFT pan holds a stack of gleaming gold bars radiating warm golden light, the RIGHT pan holds a glowing emerald-green basket filled with small diversified asset icons (miniature chart shapes, coin shapes, and bond shapes). Soft golden lens flare on the scale. Navy and gold accent color palette throughout. Background: deep navy blue gradient with golden bokeh sparkles and a faint radial glow behind the scale. COMPOSITION RULE: The image features a smooth, atmospheric gradient transition from the visual scene at the top into a deep solid black panel at the bottom, designed for clean text overlay placement. The upper portion of the frame holds the main subject and all visual elements at full saturation. The bottom 25% of the frame is fully solid pure black (#000000) reserved for text. The band between the 45% and 75% of the frame height carries a long, seamless gradient fade from the scene into black — no hard horizontal cut-off line, no abrupt visual edge between scene and black. The transition should feel organic and cinematic, like atmospheric darkness softly fading in, not a clean knife-cut. Absolutely no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no watermark anywhere in the image. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with elegant gold and navy aesthetic.
